title: Resident Technical Officer (RTO)
description:
Why Join Us?

  • Attractive Newcomer Bonus
  • Career Progression & Development Opportunities
  • Opportunity to Work Alongside an Innovative Team
  • Comprehensive Leave Packages (e.g: additional leave, birthday leave, eldercare leave, marriage leave & gift, etc...)
  • Annual Executive Health Screening

Job Responsibilities:

  • Supervise all architectural works to ensure compliance with design intent, specifications, and relevant codes.
  • Coordinate and integrate architectural works with civil, structural, and M&E works; escalate discrepancies to the Superintending Officer or Resident Architect.
  • Review and ensure timely submission of architectural materials, samples, and finishes for approval.
  • Monitor site conditions and highlight discrepancies between drawings and actual site situations before commencement of work.
  • Conduct periodic inspections to ensure quality workmanship and adherence to performance standards.
  • Coordinate with M&E supervisors to ensure proper placement of access and service openings, pipe routes, and cable trays/trunking.
  • Document and maintain all relevant site records, including inspection forms, test reports, and correspondence.
  • Support in reviewing method statements and material submissions.
  • Report incidents, non-compliance, and near misses to the Resident Architect or Qualified Person (Architectural).
  • Enforce compliance with site safety regulations and MOM requirements.
  • Perform other duties as assigned by the Superior or Project Management team.

Job Requirements:

  • Diploma/Advanced Diploma/Degree in Architecture, Building, or a related discipline.
  • Valid Resident Technical Officer (RTO) accreditation with IES (Institution of Engineers Singapore).
  • Minimum 5 years of relevant architectural supervision experience, preferably in Singapore.
  • Strong knowledge of architectural detailing, building materials, local building codes, and safety regulations.
  • Familiar with project documentation such as method statements, shop drawings, as-built drawings, and inspection protocols.
  • Good communication, coordination, and reporting skills.
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a multi-disciplinary team.
  • Experience in LTA or MRT projects is an added advantage.

postedCompany.description:
Hwa Seng Builder Pte Ltd (HSB) is a leading civil engineering and construction provider, providing an integrated range of professional civil engineering works and construction-related services in the areas of Aircraft Pavement, Runway and Taxiway, Highways and Expressways, Vehicular Bridges, Drainage works, Earthwork, Golf Course, Roadways, Sewerage, all other Infrastructure works and General Building Construction.

HSB origin can be traced back to 1992, where it was established as part of an enabling strategy to tap their technical know-how, expertise and resources to provide clients with wide spectrum of construction and engineering services.

HSB financial strength is constantly assess by leading credit rating agency. Our sound track records, personnel, and financial standing are additional references when being evaluated for major public tenders.

Over the years, HSB has successfully completed numerous projects and have achieved and received many awards.

Today, by leveraging on our solid track records and expertise in the industry, HSB is registered with the Building & Construction Authority of Singapore under “A1” classification for Civil Engineering (CW02).

HSB unwavering commitment to world-class standards of quality and service can be seen in the many awards garnered. These include ISO 9001, ISO 14001, BS OHSAS 18001, bizSAFE STAR, LTA Certificate of Merit for Construction Environmental Award, LTA Safety Excellence Award and BCA Green & Gracious Award.
postedCompany.name: HWA SENG BUILDER PTE LTD
